title: Way New Health
description: Body parts, damage types, bleeding and much more!
body:
![Mod logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e77eeb0a4898864fd1ef2eb96c843dee562ad76.png)
**Way New Health** — a vanilla-friendly, _(almost)_ fully modular health system inspired by games **RimWorld**, **Space Station 14**, and the **First Aid mod**.

It adds a **highly configurable and immersive** health overhaul that makes survival more strategic and realistic.

## Body Parts

![Health icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e7de4edc539fb9d5bb6cef06924bcc1d15e5dd36.png)

Your health is now divided between different body parts.

Each part applies its own debuffs when damaged.
However, lethal damage to the head or torso will result in instant death — so stay careful!

## Damage Types
![Damage type icons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7bec3fff2b996dd94359a84f433fdc3f9417eabd.png)
From now on, all damage you receive belongs to one of six damage types.

Each healing item added by the mod has different effectiveness depending on the type of damage.

## Blood System

Taking heavy damage at once increases the chance of receiving a bleeding wound.
Bleeding causes you to gradually lose blood over time until the wound heals naturally or is treated.

![Bleeding icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2db48ac963a30f304b2e24e6bc1f325e6cc5d500.gif)
If you lose all your blood — you will die.

## Healing

The mod uses a vanilla-style healing system based on hunger and saturation.

However, you can fully configure the healing amount — or switch to passive regeneration if you prefer.

## Destruction (Experimental)

This system is disabled by default.
If a body part’s health reaches zero, there is a chance it will be permanently destroyed.

Destroyed parts cause severe debuffs and cannot be healed by any existing methods.
